content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于8月25日 21:00 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月8日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【夏日特别活动·上：黑阳垂照的永夏】
● 特别活动「黑阳垂照的永夏」将于 9 月 1 日 9:00 - 9 月 15 日 9:00 开放！
    ○ 活动期间，累计登录 7 天可获得「无垢之芯」×10，第 7 天可额外获得限定对战头像「排球『大将』」。
    ○ 活动期间，异梦视界「再见永无乡」免费解锁开启。
【异梦视界：再见永无乡】
● 「异梦视界」新增篇章「再见永无乡」！该篇章将于 9 月 1 日 9:00 后开放。
    ○ 剧情简介：酷暑的烈日轰然坠下，一个意外的来客站到了唤醒体们的对面，一场激烈的战争一触即发，胜利的桂冠究竟会被谁摘下？
● 通关后，即可获得全新钥令「定格的仲夏留念」。
    ○ 钥令效果：选择 1 名唤醒体，将 1 张算力消耗为 0 的临时「打击」置入手中。每第 3 次释放，改为将 1 张「美丽瞬间」置入手中，并使所有唤醒体临时暴击率提高 20%。
【特别纪行：夏日纪行】
● 特别纪行「夏日纪行」将于 9 月 1 日 9:00 - 9 月 15 日 9:00 开放！
    ○ 完成纪行任务可获得 限定纪念命轮 「搭档特训」 4 个。
    ○ 购买纪行（980源液）并完成纪行任务可额外获得 「搭档特训」12个。
 
二、系统
【调查】
● 「异梦视界：再见永无乡」中增加了「序幕」功能，守密人可在此回顾相关的活动剧情。
 
三、问题修复与优化
● 修复了唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」灵知觉醒没有「保留」词缀的问题。
● 修复了「意识潜游：旺达-燃烧的群宴」剧情第一节对话卡住的问题。
● 修复了端内搜索「help」英语场景下搜索失效的问题。
● 修复了编队界面进入唤醒体详情提升技能等级、提升唤醒体等级等操作没有实时同步到队伍界面的问题。
● 修复了在序章中可以唤出的设置菜单的问题。
● 修复了「邀请活动」界面红点闪烁的问题。
● 修复了「商店」礼包存在说明错别字的问题。
● 修复了「幕间演习」中可能存在的界面卡住的问题。
● 修复了英语场景下唤醒体对话时概率出现文案和聊天框错位的问题。
● 修复了相位对弈中命轮「隐秘的诞生」在装备后显示描述不正确的问题。
● 修复了「命轮叠位」中小概率出现界面卡住的问题。
● 修复了相位对弈中唤醒体克莱门汀的狂气爆发「生命重构治疗」无法正确弃置对方钥令卡的问题。
● 修复了相位对弈中钥令「脑中之音」在编队时未能正确显示钥令卡图片的问题。
● 修复了相位对弈中钥令「不落的太阳」未能正确显示钥令卡图片的问题。
● 优化了语言设置为英语时的以下文本表述问题：
    ○ 优化了活动「坠临的万千耀光」、活动「在春天凋零以前」中部分UI文本的翻译。
        ■ 优化了意识深潜、融灾挑战、超验存在界面中的部分文本显示问题。
        ■ 优化了图鉴-留声机中各OST专辑名、曲名、专辑描述的翻译。
        ■ 优化了唤醒体凯蒂古拉相位对弈模式的技能描述。
        ■ 修复了部分剧情文本中的术语翻译。

V2.3.1.3 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on August 25 at 21:00. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on September 8, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Activity
[Summer Special Event: Part I - Summer under Black Sun]
● The special event "Summer under Black Sun" will be open from September 1 at 9:00 AM to September 15 at 9:00 AM!
    ○ During the event, logging in for a cumulative 7 days will reward you with 10 "Pure Cores", and on the 7th day, you will receive an additional exclusive battle avatar "Volleyball 'General'".
    ○ During the event, the "Dreamscape: Farewell Neverland" will be unlocked for free.

[Dreamscape: Farewell Neverland]
● The "Dreamscape" has added a new chapter "Farewell Neverland"! This chapter will be open after 9:00 on September 1.
    ○ Storyline: The scorching summer sun crashes down, and an unexpected visitor stands before the Awakeners. A fierce battle is about to erupt—will victory's laurel be claimed by them or us?
● Upon completion, you will acquire the new Posse "Beachside Memento".
    ○ Posse Effect: Choose 1 Awakener and add 1 temporary "Strike" with 0 Arithmetica cost to their hand. Every 3rd time this is played, instead add 1 "Fleeting Beauty" to their hand and increase the temporary Crit. Rate of all Awakeners by 20%.
 
[Special Journey: Summer Archives]
● The Special Journey "Summer Archives" will be open from September 1 at 9:00 AM to September 15 at 9:00 AM!
    ○ Complete Journey tasks to obtain 4 copies of the limited commemorative Wheel of Destiny "Partner Training".
    ○ Purchase the Journey (980 Silver Prime) and complete Journey tasks to receive an additional 12 "Special Training" items.

2.System
[Investigation]
● The "Prologue" feature has been added to "Dreamscape: Farewell Neverland," where Keepers can review related event storylines.

3.Problem Fix and Optimization
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Kathigu-Ra" lacked the "Retain" affix in the Gnosis Awakening.
● Fixed the issue where the first dialogue of the "Psyche Deepdive: Wanda - Feast of Flames" story section would get stuck.
● Fixed the issue where searching "help" within the app did not work properly in English mode.
● Fixed the issue where operations such as upgrading skill levels and increasing Awakener levels in the Lineup interface were not being synchronized to the team interface in real time.
● Fixed an issue where the Settings menu could be summoned in the Prologue.
● Fixed the issue where the red dot blinked on the "Invitation Event" interface.
● Fixed the typo in the description of the "Store" pack.
● Fixed potential interface freezing issues in "Interlude".
● Fixed the issue where the text and chat box were occasionally misaligned during Awakener dialogue in English scenarios.
● Fixed the issue where the description of the Wheel of Destiny "Shrouded Birth" was displayed incorrectly after being equipped in Traphase.
● Fixed an issue where the interface would occasionally freeze during "Wheel of Destiny Ascension".
● Fixed the issue where Awakener Clementine's Exalt "Lifeform Reconstruction" could not correctly discard the opponent's Posse cards during Traphase.
● Fixed an issue where the Posse "Voices in Your Head" did not display its card image correctly in Traphase when in the Lineup.
● Fixed an issue where the Posse "Undying Sun" was not displaying its Posse card image correctly in Traphase.

● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
        ■ Optimized Awakener Kathigu-Ra's Traphase mode card description translations.
        ■ Improved text display issues in the interfaces of Psyche Deepdive, D-Effect Zone, and Arcane Dominion.
        ■ Improved translations for OST album titles, track names, and album descriptions in Archive-Phonograph. 
        ■ Optimized translations for some UI texts in the events "A Million Suns Descend" and "Before Spring Fades".
        ■ Fixed terminology translations in some story texts.
what timezone are we referring to?
I like how GPT for the en just dreamed up translation dreamed up the wrong date
